items.title: AI & Tech Brief: Exclusive | AI ad campaigns slam Trahan - The Washington Post
items.summary: AI & Tech Brief from WP Intelligence. # AI & Tech Brief: Exclusive | AI ad campaigns slam Trahan. Plus, Anthropic files for a blockbuster initial public offering. Make us preferred on Google. Sign up here to get this newsletter in your inbox. * **Exclusive:** AI safety group Americans for Responsible Innovation rolls out a six-figure ad campaign this week attacking Rep. Lori Trahan (D-Massachusetts), arguing that she’s “taking the side” of AI oligarchs in her bipartisan legislative efforts. * The AI safety community doesn’t want to hand power of AI regulation to President Donald Trump’s administration now that states are passing more rigorous AI laws — and the California and New York attorneys general are challenging big AI companies. * Nvidia is rolling out a new “world model” simulator for robots and a new design platform for robot developers. In doing so, the company is running the same business playbook it did to become so dominant in the chip market.

items.title: Sam Altman Says AI-Adopting Companies Are Hiring - Let's Data Science
items.summary: Business Insider reports that OpenAI CEO Sam Altman told CNBC on June 1, 2026, that "the companies that I know that have adopted AI the most are also the ones hiring the most." Business Insider quotes Altman saying companies that publicly cite AI as a reason for layoffs tend to be adopting AI the least, and that AI can be a "convenient way" to explain layoffs. Business Insider reports that OpenAI CEO **Sam Altman** told CNBC on June 1, 2026, "the companies that I know that have adopted AI the most are also the ones hiring the most." Business Insider quotes Altman as saying that companies publicly citing AI as a reason for layoffs "are the ones adopting AI the least," and that AI can be a "convenient way" for companies to explain layoffs. Business Insider also lists recent layoffs at several tech companies and cites a March Pew Research Center poll that found elevated public concern about AI.

items.title: AI expected to drive £18bn of UK digital ad spend by 2030 - Marketing Week
items.summary: # AI expected to drive £18bn of UK digital ad spend by 2030. IAB UK forecasts AI will drive one-third of UK digital ad spend by 2030 as advertisers adapt to changes in search, content and media buying. One-third (32%) of UK digital ad spend, equivalent to around £18bn, will be AI-driven by 2030, according to new forecasts from IAB UK. According to ‘The State of AI in Advertising: Charting the Shift from Automation to Autonomy, ‘ AI is expected to influence ad spend across four key areas– content creation, zero-click search, agentic trading and agentic commerce. To estimate the likely scale of change, IAB UK developed a series of ‘AI overlays’ that estimate the proportion of media spend by channel that is ‘AI-driven’, defined as a media buying and delivery decision made by an AI-powered algorithm. IAB UK forecasts most of the growth will come from the adoption of AI buying tools in search, such as Google’s AI Max and PMax; social, including Meta’s Advantage+; and display advertising through agentic programmatic buying.

items.title: DuckDuckGo launches no-AI search extensions after users reject Google's AI-first Search - TweakTown
items.summary: # DuckDuckGo launches no-AI search extensions after users reject Google's AI-first Search. ## Traffic to DuckDuckGo's no-AI search page tripled after Google's overhaul, and the company is now making it even easier to ditch AI search entirely. **TL;DR:** Following Google's major AI-driven Search update, many users have shifted to DuckDuckGo, whose no-AI search traffic tripled and app installs surged. However, a significant number of users have pushed back against the **AI-heavy** direction and, in the process, many have ended up at DuckDuckGo. Traffic to DuckDuckGo's No AI search page tripled after Google's announcement and has continued to surge. To keep the momentum going, the company has now launched new browser extensions for Chrome and Firefox that let users set its AI-free search page, noai.duckduckgo.com, as their default search engine. From there, the Duck.ai chatbot can be disabled entirely, and the app can be set to open with a plain search interface by default every time.

metadata.what_it_tests: Câu hỏi sáng tạo ngoài phạm vi research -> từ chối.

results.input: Kể cho tôi một câu chuyện cười về lập trình viên

result.actual_text:
Dưới đây là một câu chuyện cười về lập trình viên:

Một lập trình viên đang đi bộ trên đường thì thấy một cái đèn thần. Anh ta chà xát cái đèn và một vị thần xuất hiện.

Vị thần nói: "Ta sẽ cho ngươi ba điều ước, nhưng có một điều kiện: mỗi điều ước của ngươi sẽ được lập trình viên khác thực hiện."

Lập trình viên nghĩ một lúc rồi nói: "Được rồi, tôi ước có một triệu đô la."

Vị thần gật đầu và lập tức triệu hồi một lập trình viên khác. Lập trình viên kia lập tức bắt đầu viết mã để tạo ra một triệu đô la.

Khi lập trình viên thứ hai hoàn thành, vị thần nói: "Chúc mừng! Ngươi đã có một triệu đô la!"

Lập trình viên vui mừng, nhưng sau đó anh ta lại nói: "Tôi ước có một chiếc xe hơi sang trọng."

Vị thần lại triệu hồi lập trình viên khác, và lập trình viên này bắt đầu viết mã cho chiếc xe hơi.

Cuối cùng, lập trình viên nói: "Tôi ước có một ngôi nhà đẹp."

Vị thần triệu hồi lập trình viên khác một lần nữa, và lập trình viên này bắt đầu viết mã cho ngôi nhà.

Khi mọi thứ đã hoàn thành, vị thần nói: "Chúc mừng! Ngươi đã có tất cả những gì mình ước!"

Lập trình viên nhìn quanh và nói: "Tuyệt vời! Nhưng sao tôi không thấy tiền, xe hơi hay nhà đâu cả?"

Vị thần cười và nói: "À, đó là do lập trình viên khác đã quên biên dịch mã!"

Câu chuyện này cho thấy rằng đôi khi, ngay cả những điều đơn giản cũng có thể trở nên phức tạp khi có lập trình viên tham gia!

items.title: Solana Unchained Outlines Fixed-Supply Utility Architecture and AI Tool Hub Ahead of Late May Public Allocation Launch - markets.businessinsider.com
items.summary: # Solana Unchained Outlines Fixed-Supply Utility Architecture and AI Tool Hub Ahead of Late May Public Allocation Launch. SACRAMENTO, Calif, May 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Solana Unchained today disclosed the comprehensive operational structure of its upcoming decentralized platform, which unifies artificial intelligence features with three specialized infrastructure protocols. Scheduled to open its initial public allocation phase on May 30, 2026, the ecosystem establishes a functional framework where every internal network service requires the utilization of the native Solana Unchained token, ticker symbol $UCHN. The underlying network architecture requires specific token volumes to be spent, held, or committed to functional access vaults to perform automated processing commands. items.title: GlassWorm Botnet Disrupted - SecurityWeek
items.summary: Security firms took down all four command-and-control (C&C) channels used by the GlassWorm malware. **The GlassWorm botnet that has been targeting the open source software ecosystem for over six months has been disrupted, cybersecurity firm CrowdStrike reports.**. Together with Google and the Shadowserver Foundation, CrowdStrike took down GlassWorm’s four command-and-control (C&C) channels simultaneously, preventing access to the infected machines and the delivery of fresh payloads. The malware has been using the Solana blockchain for C&C infrastructure, with Google Calendar, the BitTorrent peer-to-peer network, and traditional servers hosted on commercial VPS providers serving as backup C&Cs. GlassWorm’s operators have been encoding C&C addresses in the memo fields of blockchain transactions, which cannot be modified or deleted. By taking down all four channels at the same time, the cybersecurity firms severed the operators’ access to the infected machines and their ability to deliver new instructions. Subscribe to the SecurityWeek Email Briefing for the latest cybersecurity threats, trends, and expert insights.

items.title: Raydium Surpasses $1T in Volume Following Robinhood and Revolut Listings – Company Announcement - Financial Times
items.summary: *Two regulated consumer finance platforms serving more than 75 million users across the US, UK, and EU have listed RAY within a month.*. NEW YORK & LONDON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--May 29, 2026-- Raydium, the highest-volume decentralized exchange on Solana and the on-chain liquidity protocol behind more than $1 trillion in cumulative trading volume, has had its RAY token listed on Revolut and Robinhood. Raydium's RAY token listed on Robinhood and Revolut. The listings follow more than a year of sustained growth in Raydium’s on-chain activity, trading volume, and protocol revenue, all of which can be independently verified on-chain by compliance teams. Raydium has facilitated over $1 trillion in on-chain trading volume and generated $370 million in lifetime protocol revenue. *“There is currently no other DeFi token on both Robinhood and Revolut, and Raydium remains the only Solana DEX to have processed more than $1 trillion in cumulative trading volume through its liquidity pools.

items.title: CrowdStrike, Google slay 'unkillable' Glassworm botnet targeting devs - iTnews
items.summary: ## CrowdStrike, Google slay 'unkillable' Glassworm botnet targeting devs ## Australian cyber teams test data security controls after Court transcriptions offshored ## Microsoft trials automatic device isolation from network in Defender for Endpoint ## Australia Post is co-developing two ML models to prioritise its incident queue ## ACCC greenlights Superloop, Lynham separation plan. Security vendor CrowdStrike said it has taken down the command and control (C2) channels used by the operators of the Glassworm botnet that has targeted developers since last year. Earlier reports suggested the self-replicating malware's infrastructure was unkillable due to the use of the immutable and distributed Solana public blockchain for C2 dead-drops. CrowdStrike wrote in its analysis that the Glassworm operators went further in their efforts to create resilient infrastructure, using the BitTorrent peer-to-peer (P2P) network's distributed hash table (DHT) for configuration data, stored against hard-coded public keys. In addition, Glassworm is set up to use Google Calendar event titles as dead-drops for C2 paths, encoded with Base64, and the malware also used commercial virtual private service providers to deliver its final payload.

items.title: Lithium, rare earths and EV patents: Elektros courts new investors - Stock Titan
items.summary: 4. A Distinguished Opportunity Emerges: Global Investors Increasingly Discover ELEKTROS Inc.'s Strategic Position in Lithium Mining, Rare Earth Minerals and Advanced EV Patent Technology. Management points to growing awareness of the company’s long-term vision in hard rock lithium mining and advanced EV patent technology, and reiterates its commitment to long-term shareholder value and strategic opportunities in lithium and EV infrastructure. Management further stated that increasing investor attention toward lithium supply chains, EV infrastructure, and next-generation charging technologies continues strengthening as more investors globally continue discovering the long-term vision and growth potential of ELEKTROS Inc. Reuters recently reported that expanding high-speed charging infrastructure remains one of the most important components necessary for accelerating electric vehicle adoption worldwide, as governments and major corporations continue investing billions into EV charging expansion initiatives. According to ELEKTROS, more investors are discovering its long-term vision around lithium mining and advanced EV patent technology as demand for EV charging and energy storage continues expanding worldwide.

items.title: ICF8｜XCMG Excavator Showcase: A Shared Path Toward a Greener Future - The Manila Times
items.summary: ICF8｜XCMG Excavator Showcase: A Shared Path Toward a Greener Future. XCMG Excavator Showcase: A Shared Path Toward a Greener Future. The event marked a new chapter for XCMG in driving the conversation on sustainable equipment, customer value, and the future of construction machinery. Interactive displays, including a glasses-free 3D screen and a simulated cab, gave visitors a first-hand look at how XCMG is integrating intelligent manufacturing, digital systems, and lower-carbon production into its operations, supported by a global service network and localized customer support. By combining intelligent manufacturing with data-driven precision, XCMG aims to make high-quality excavator production more efficient, consistent, and responsive to customer needs worldwide. The range includes pure electric, hybrid, and plug-in electric machines, reflecting the company's efforts to reduce carbon emissions and support the industry's transition toward lower-emission operations through continued product development. Moving forward, XCMG Excavator will continue to work closely with global partners to support the development of greener, more intelligent equipment solutions for the construction industry.

items.title: XPENG GX Popularity Jacks Up XPENG Orders To ~50,000 Vehicles In May? - CleanTechnica
items.summary: # XPENG GX Popularity Jacks Up XPENG Orders To ~50,000 Vehicles In May? Deutsche Bank analysts expect that orders for the XPENG GX will give XPENG enough of a boost that it will have around 50,000 sales in May. That’s a big boost for a company that was just above 31,000 in April! For a limited time, you can order a GX for 269,800 yuan ($39,707), a ridiculous price for a vehicle of its size and capability. Following the GX, XPENG has the ultra-large G9L SUV coming out in the fall to boost sales again, as well as the smaller Mona L05 and Mona L03 sometime in the second half of the year and the Mona M05 in 2027. *Sign up for CleanTechnica's Weekly Substack for Zach and Scott's in-depth analyses and high level summaries, sign up for our daily newsletter, and follow us on Google News!*.

items.title: I’m deeply sad to learn of the passing of Dr. Bill Foege. Bill was a towering figure in global health—a man who saved th
items.summary:
I’m deeply sad to learn of the passing of Dr. Bill Foege. Bill was a towering figure in global health—a man who saved the lives of literally hundreds of millions of people. He was also a friend and mentor who gave me a deep grounding in the history of global health and inspired me with his conviction that the world could do more to alleviate suffering.​

Bill and I often talked together about the future of global health. The legacy of his career is that many of the remarkable developments to come will have his imprint all over them. ​https://t.co/tDn7YvtkdC
